trust.reason: Generated local IntelliJ Platform Ivy metadata differs between IDE artifact repositories; bundled module JARs remain checksum verified
Generated local IntelliJ Platform Ivy metadata differs between IDE artifact repositories; bundled plugin JARs remain checksum verified

trust.name: .*-sources.jar
trust.reason: Sources are often not present in all repositories or are resolved dynamically by the IDE

trust.name: .*-src.zip
trust.reason: Gradle distribution sources are resolved dynamically by the IDE
